meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Debugging Workflow for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to conquer debugging bottlenecks. This guide helps freelancers ship faster with Antigravity and AI-driven workflows.
content.answer_block: To resolve debugging bottlenecks, initialize Claude Code within your repository to leverage context-aware analysis. By integrating Antigravity, you automate root-cause identification across complex codebases. This setup transforms your terminal into an intelligent pair-programmer, enabling you to pinpoint errors, generate patches, and ship client projects with unprecedented velocity and precision.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on a high-stakes client delivery, and you’re trapped in a recursive loop of cryptic tracebacks. Manual debugging isn't just killing your profit margins—it's eroding your reputation as a high-velocity developer. When the stack trace looks like hieroglyphics and the deadline is breathing down your neck, you don't need more coffee; you need a smarter architectural approach to code analysis.

Enter the synergy of Claude Code and Antigravity. This isn't just another plugin; it's a structural shift in how you handle technical debt and logic errors. By setting up a specialized AI-agent workflow, you stop fighting the compiler and start orchestrating solutions, allowing you to bypass the mental fatigue of manual debugging and focus on what you’re actually paid for: shipping features that work.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, context-aware bridge between your repository and the Claude CLI to ensure the model has full visibility of your project structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project architecture and identify potential failure points in the data flow.

steps.title: Contextual Mapping
steps.description: Index your codebase to allow Claude to understand dependencies, reducing the 'hallucination' factor during complex debugging sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the dependency graph of my core service layer and highlight circular references.

steps.title: Automated Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use the CLI to pipe error logs directly into the AI, bypassing manual copy-pasting and capturing environmental variables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Isolate the root cause of the recent runtime exception based on the provided stack trace.

steps.title: Iterative Patch Generation
steps.description: Generate surgical code fixes that respect your existing style guide and architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a patch that fixes the bug while maintaining backward compatibility with the legacy API endpoints.

steps.title: Validation & Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break peripheral modules by running automated checks against the newly applied patch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify this patch against existing unit tests and suggest additional test cases to prevent regression.

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, which saves tokens and improves accuracy.
Force Claude to explain its 'reasoning chain' before it writes a single line of code to ensure you agree with the architectural direction.
Leverage the 'diff' mode in Claude Code for large files to see exactly what is being changed before hitting apply, preserving your git history integrity.
Keep your Antigravity prompts modular; use one for analysis and a separate one for implementation to keep the context window focused.
Use alias commands in your shell (e.g., 'alias cfix="claude run --debug"') to reduce friction and speed up your daily debugging loop.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, begin by migrating your most complex legacy module to this workflow. Monitor the reduction in 'time-to-first-fix' and refine your Antigravity prompts to match your specific coding style.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your development speed. Arm yourself with the tools that elite freelancers use to dominate the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
